name: !goToCoordinates
description: Go to the given x, y, z location within the given closeness value.

closeness.recommended use: Use as large of a closeness value as to maximize the chance of success. Closeness values near 1 are much more likely to fail than larger closeness values.

horizontal_distance_from_current_positio.description: The target x/z coordinate must be within 500 horizontal blocks of the agent's current x/z position.

name: !search
description: Search for the nearest block or entity of a given type by sweeping radii 32, 64, 128, 256 from the bot's current position. Equivalent to running a maximum-radius search; there is no broader scan available.

constraints.abstract_targets_allowed: Concrete names (e.g. "oak_log", "diamond_ore") and registered abstract category names (e.g. "any_log") are both accepted. Abstract searches expand internally to one !searchForBlock per concrete member at each radius — usually more efficient than searching members individually. When a candidate in CANDIDATE_TARGETS is abstract, prefer the abstract form. Use the candidate's exact name when possible.
constraints.plan_terminates_on_success: As soon as one !search action finds a candidate AND the bot reaches it, the entire plan ends successfully and execution returns to the structured loop. Subsequent actions in the plan are skipped. Issue !search aggressively — a wasted scan costs only one radius sweep.
constraints.exhaustion_is_terminal_at_position: If !search returns 'search_exhausted', re-issuing !search from the same position will fail identically. The bot must relocate (via !goToCoordinates, !digDown, or !goToSurface) before another !search will yield new results.
constraints.no_repeat_in_sequence: Two !search actions with the same exact target string in one plan without a relocation between them will short-circuit to 'search_already_attempted'.

name: !digDown
description: Digs straight down a specified distance from the bot's current position. Stops if it reaches lava, water, or a fall >=4 blocks below the bot.

constraints.recommended_use: Useful for accessing underground biomes when searching for ores or caves. Each !digDown moves the bot 1-32 blocks closer to a different y-level slice, where the next !search will sweep a fresh region.

name: !goToSurface
description: Moves the bot to the highest block above it, usually the surface.

constraints.recommended_use: Use after underground searches exhaust to return the bot to surface terrain before heading to a new biome.
